# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: Streamlining Engagement: Workflow Improvements Live!
- Summary: We've rolled out key updates to our engagement workflow, including better URL verification and improved JSON handling for social media targets. Learn more about how these changes enhance our content generation process.
- Slug: engagement-workflow-enhancements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-engagement-workflow-enhancements
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-12-engagement-workflow-enhancements.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No media is required for this campaign.

## Brief

- Core message: Recent development efforts have focused on refining our internal engagement workflow. Key improvements include the implementation of a `wait_for_public_url` function for more robust URL verification and enhanced JSON handling for social media targets, ensuring smoother content generation and distribution.
- CTA: Explore our latest development updates on GitHub!
- Visual brief: A clean, abstract graphic representing data flow, API connections, or a simplified workflow diagram.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.

### LinkedIn

Enabled: true

We're excited to announce significant updates to our engagement workflow, designed to streamline content generation and distribution.

Key improvements include:

*   **Enhanced URL Verification:** Implemented a `wait_for_public_url` function for more robust verification of social media targets.
*   **Improved JSON Handling:** Refined JSON processing for social media targets, ensuring smoother data flow.

These updates are part of our ongoing commitment to refining our internal development processes. Explore the details and our latest development updates on GitHub!

Learn more: https://codegrind.online
